volumio_info.details: Automatically starts playback from USB media when a USB drive is inserted or already present at boot. Uses Volumio REST APIs to keep queue, metadata and artwork fully synchronized with the user interface.
volumio_info.changelog: 1.0.0 - First stable release. Added USB hot-plug autoplay, boot-time autoplay, Volumio REST API integration, queue and metadata synchronization, random/repeat support, and udev-based triggering.
